title: Post-M8 UI interaction and i18n audit
summary: Produce the current-code blocker matrix for default UI, mouse interaction, camera, commands, localization, responsive behavior, visual identity and minimum playable chain.
acceptance: Audits whether the default launch still reads as diagnostics/product-gate harness versus player HUD
Audits selectable residents/objects, UI button clickability, pointer-event layering, camera drag/zoom/keyboard behavior and failure feedback
Audits zh-CN/en locale defaults, manual language switching, hardcoded player-visible strings, missing-key coverage and diagnostics isolation
Audits windowed/fullscreen responsive behavior for the required viewport set and records screenshot or DOM evidence needs
Records whether a minimum playable interaction chain is currently real, absent or blocked by protocol/adapter gaps
forbiddenPaths: public release or platform verdict changes
telemetry, accounts, paid services or public save compatibility
